sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the white shape has moved UP. The white shape's opening faces DOWN. The green shape is below the white shape. The red blocks are visible.
Let me check the current state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N', 'R']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows[{min(rows)}-{max(rows)}] cols[{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")

total_green = sum(n['pixels'] for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"\nTotal green pixels: {total_green}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
